[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001101000 3
1 0010001100 3
2 1101101100 6
3 0110110110 6
4 0101001000 3
5 0101001110 5
6 1010010110 5
7 0001101000 3

01 10 0001000000 1
12 21 0000001000 1
23 32 0000001100 2
34 43 0100100100 3
45 54 0100000000 1
56 65 0101001000 3 match 4
67 76 0101000100 3
70 07 0101000001 3

02 20 0010000000 1
13 31 0001101000 3 match 0 7
24 42 0010000100 2
35 53 0101001000 3 match 4
46 64 0100000110 3
57 75 0101000000 2
60 06 0101000010 3
71 17 0001000000 1

47 74 0100000100 2
50 05 0101000000 2
61 16 0001001000 2
72 27 0000000100 1

26 62 0000001100 2
